top_signals.title: Japan’s automotive industry is driving — slowly — toward a greener future
top_signals.summary: While major carmakers have committed to cut emissions, the industry's slow shift to EVs means that it faces a high hurdle if it wants to achieve carbon neutrality by 2050.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran switches World Cup base from U.S. to Mexico
top_signals.summary: The Iranian team will now be based in Tijuana on the border of Mexico and the United States.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
